title: Atlantis
description:
Minecraft Atlantis ist ein Projekt des Cee_1-Team's. Dieses ist Modpack für das Minecraft-Projekt Atlantis!
Für die Teilname am Projekt dringend Empfohlen.
body:
Hello everyone,

Atlantis is a Minecraft Modpack, wich you are able to Download and to Play. We are using this for your Project "Minecraft Atlantis". The Mods in this Modpack are standard Mods, like _Just Enough Items_, _Mouse Wheelie_ or _JourneyMap_, but there are also Mods like _Ambient Sound_, _3D Layerd Skin_ or _Apple Skin_. These Mods are cool and make your expirience in Minecraft better! Thank you for Reading!

### A Trailer for our Project can be found on YouTube at: 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sX9BysTAXwo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### The Minecraft-Server is reachable under the following IP-Address:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
atlantis-mc.de
```

</details>



Please **_DON'T_** steal our Assets in the Modpack.
The Assets are all self **_MADE_** and its illegal to steal these Assets!!!

Project & Modpack made by
### **Cee_1-Team**
